expected.notes: C-corp with non-resident alien shareholders triggers dividend withholding advisory.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'advisory_dividend_withholding'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.entity_type eq c_corp
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
